title: Proclamation No. 449, s. 1989
text:
MALACAÑANG Manila

PROCLAMATION NO. 449

RESERVING FOR SCHOOL SITE PURPOSES A CERTAIN PARCEL OF LAND OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN BARANGAY GABI, MUNICIPALITY OF COMPOSTELA, PROVINCE OF DAVAO DEL NORTE, ISLAND OF MINDANAO

Upon the recommendation of the Secretary of the Department of Environment and Natural Resources and pursuant to the authority vested in me by law, I, CORAZON C. AQUINO, President of the Philippines, do hereby withdraw from sale or settlement, and reserve for school site purposes of Gabi Barangay High School under the administration of the Department of Education, Culture and Sports, subject to private rights, if any there be, a certain parcel of land of the public domain situated in Barangay Gabi, Municipality of Compostela, Province of Davao del Norte, Island of Mindanao, and more particularly described as follows, to wit:

Lot No. 6232, Ts-283 (GABI BARANGAY HIGH SCHOOL SITE)

A PARCEL OF LAND, Lot No. 6232, Ts-283, situated in Gabi, Compostela, Davao del Norte, Island of Mindanao. Bounded on the Northeast along lines 5-6, 6-7 and 7-8 by road (15.00 m. wide); on the Southeast along lines 8-9 and 9-1 by Road (10.00 m. wide); on the Southwest along lines 1-2, 2-3 and 3-4 by Road and on the Northwest along lines 4-5 by Road (10.00 m. wide). Beginning at a point marked “1” on plan, being N. 47 deg. 32’E., 538.93 m. from BLLM No. 2, Pls-2.

thence N. 70 deg. 12’W., 87.57 m. to point 2; thence N. 28 deg. 10’W., 60.97 m. to point 3; thence N. 16 deg. 05’E., 7.22 m. to point 4; thence N. 62 deg. 05’E., 176.14 m. to point 5; thence S. 74 deg. 16’E., 6.78 m. to point 6; thence S. 27 deg. 43’E., 52.00 m. to point 7; thence S. 19 deg. 40’W., 7.07 m. to point 8; thence S. 61 deg. 01’W., 44.34 m. to point 9; thence S. 20 deg. 24’W., 103.29 m. to point of

beginning; containing an area of SIXTEEN THOUSAND THREE HUNDRED ONE (16,301) Square Meters more or less. All points referred to are indicated on the plan and marked on the ground by B.L. Cyl. Conc. Mons., 15 x 60 cms. Bearings true. Date of survey, September 8, 9, and 14, 1955 by Engr. I. Lara and was approved on May 22, 1957.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Republic of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done in the City of Manila, this 15th day of August, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and eighty-nine.

(Sgd.) CORAZON C. AQUINO

By the President: (Sgd.) CATALINO MACARAIG, JR. Executive Secretary

Source: CDAsia
